category_sources: source_facts.description says it tracks highest uptimes; official GitHub README describes Uptimed as an uptime record daemon tracking highest system uptimes.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README introduction uses Uptimed; source_facts.name is uptimed.
docs_sources: Official repository README is the primary documentation surface with introduction, availability, and contact information.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/rpodgorny/uptimed, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists uptimed and uprecords; official README describes an uptime record daemon with a console front-end; source_facts.description says it tracks highest uptimes.
